overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist exploring a historic Middle Eastern waterfront city. The character moves from a sunlit river promenade through narrow streets and into a courtyard with Islamic architectural elements, ending in a covered stone corridor.

events.description: character begins walking along the waterfront promenade
character descends stone steps toward the water's edge

agents.ego_description: standing on the promenade overlooking the river, then walking down the stone steps toward the water

notable_agents.action: two robed figures sitting on a stone bench facing the river

entered.detail: calm water reflecting bright morning sunlight with distant boats
large wooden cranes and dock equipment on the far shore
rectangular stone seating platforms along the waterfront
beige stone buildings with wooden balconies and arched windows

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a sunlit stone promenade overlooking a calm river with wooden dock structures visible across the water. Two NPCs sit on a bench to the left. The character walks forward and descends steps toward the water's edge, with historic buildings lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with merchant stalls and residences

events.description: character turns away from the river toward the city streets
character approaches and enters a large arched doorway

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path then turning inland toward a building entrance, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: robed pedestrian walking along the path toward the camera
group of NPCs conversing near the arched entrance

entered.detail: lattice wooden structure with hanging plants and fabric awnings
large pointed arch entrance with hanging lantern and blue decorative tiles

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the river and walks along a narrow street lined with historic buildings. A wooden merchant stall with lattice work appears on the right. The character approaches a large arched stone doorway where NPCs are gathered, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with central fountain and decorative tilework

events.description: character enters the sunlit courtyard through the archway
character transitions from walking to running across the courtyard

agents.ego_description: entering the courtyard and moving toward the far archway, transitioning from a walk to a run

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the decorative fountain
pedestrian ascending the stone staircase to the upper level

entered.detail: ornate blue and white tiled water feature with geometric patterns against the wall
stone stairs with wooden railing leading to an upper balcony
vibrant purple flowers in the foreground near the passage entrance
dark archway leading to a narrow covered passage on the far side of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters a sunlit interior courtyard featuring an ornate blue-tiled fountain on the left and a stone staircase on the right. Purple flowering bushes frame the foreground. The character runs across the flagstone pavement toward a dark exit archway while NPCs move through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered corridor with lattice windows

events.description: character enters the dark narrow corridor from the courtyard
character slows from running to walking as approaching the corridor exit

agents.ego_description: running through the narrow stone corridor toward the light at the far end, then slowing down

entered.detail: tall stone walls with wooden lattice windows casting geometric shadow patterns
colorful draped textiles hanging overhead in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, covered stone corridor with high walls and wooden lattice windows that create striped shadows on the ground. The space is dimly lit with light visible at the far end. Colorful fabric awnings hang overhead as the character moves through the passage toward the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open riverfront promenade into the dim, enclosed confines of a stone corridor. It begins with the character descending steps from a sunlit promenade overlooking a calm river and wooden docks, moving past historic buildings and seated NPCs. As the character turns away from the water, the scene shifts into a narrow street lined with merchant stalls and pedestrians before passing through a large arched stone doorway. The camera then opens into a sunlit interior courtyard featuring an ornate blue-tiled fountain and purple flowering bushes, with the character running across the flagstones toward a dark exit. Finally, the environment transitions into a dimly lit, covered stone corridor where wooden lattice windows cast striped shadows across the ground beneath colorful fabric awnings.
